label: Images, video & spatial grids

node.label: Images, video & spatial grids
node.definition: Regular spatial arrays encode pixels, voxels, fields, maps, and video frames.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Images, video & spatial grids is to connect Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Signal processing & harmonic analysis to downstream capabilities including Multimodal, simulated & streaming data, Self-supervised learning, Masked prediction objectives.
examples: substrate for Multimodal, simulated & streaming data
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
